Package
Description
org.episteme.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.

  • Uses of Stratum in org.episteme.social.history.archeology

    Method parameters in org.episteme.social.history.archeology with type arguments of type Stratum
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    StratigraphyModel.isSequenceConsistent(List<Stratum> sequence)
    Verifies if a list of strata and their declared relationships are logically symmetric and consistent.
